infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SprintCargo needs your location to show nearby jobs and track deliveries.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SprintCargo uses the camera to take photos of loaded cargo and delivery confirmation.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SprintCargo accesses your photo library for uploading delivery photos.
